description_long: This pair of shoes features a unique, sculptural design with a speckled stone-like upper and a series of rounded, stacked cylindrical heels resembling ceramic or plastic segments. The upper portion has multiple oval cutouts along the instep, providing both ventilation and a striking visual pattern. The toe area is open, and the heel is closed, with the upper material wrapping around the ankle in a high, supportive collar. The heel construction is particularly distinctive, composed of three large, glossy, rounded segments that give the shoes a futuristic and avant-garde appearance. The color palette is primarily a mottled gray and black for the upper, with the heel segments in a lighter, glossy gray. There are no visible logos or branding elements, and the shoes appear to be in pristine, unused condition.
description: A pair of avant-garde, open-toe shoes with a speckled stone-like upper and stacked, glossy cylindrical heels. The design is modern and sculptural, with multiple cutouts and a high ankle collar.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open-toe design, multiple oval cutouts along the upper, and the high ankle collar.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stacked, rounded cylindrical heels and the sculptural curve of the upper.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the closed heel area and the full profile of the three stacked heel segments.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view emphasizing the heel construction and the continuous curve of the upper material.
